These are the steps that you need to follow to run Qwen3
on your laptop or desktop.
The first step is simply to download Qwen3
model, a GGUF file, and place it inside the folder.
Second step is to use make command to create a binary executable file.

the GGUF file that you have used and basically run the Qwen3 model locally.

what was going on inside the model.
